author: Yasin Aribuga
description: A minimal Todoist-like task manager for Obsidian using local Markdown files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Yasin Aribuga
manifest.description: A minimal Todoist-like task manager using local Markdown files.
manifest.name: belki

name: belki

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## belki 0.1.6

This release focuses on startup reliability and mobile Add Task usability.

### Fixed
- Fixed a startup crash where belki could fail with `File already exists` when internal data files or folders already existed.
- Made task storage initialization idempotent and safer around existing files, folders, and sync/race conditions.
- Added clearer notices and console diagnostics when a storage path has the wrong type, such as a file where a folder is expected.
- Registered the belki view before task data finishes loading so restored tabs are less likely to show as unavailable during app startup.
- Fixed Add Task composer popovers so the project/location picker and `...` menu stay attached to their trigger controls instead of opening far away.
- Improved mobile Add Task label entry so the label input stays visible when the iOS keyboard opens.
- On mobile, Labels and Deadline popovers now open above the `...` menu when appropriate.

### Notes
- No data migration is required.
- Existing local Markdown task data is preserved.
- Inbox still behaves as a smart/default destination and is not written as `project:: Inbox`.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Treat Inbox as a smart view instead of a stored project.
- Tasks created without a real project no longer write a `project::` line.
- Existing `project:: Inbox` / `project:: inbox` values are normalized as unprojected tasks.
- Inbox now shows active tasks without a real project, including older tasks that were previously saved with `project:: Inbox`.
- Projects lists and project grouping now ignore reserved Inbox values.
- Add Task still shows “Inbox” as the default destination, but saves it as no project.
- Task detail project picker supports a no-project state and only lists real projects.
- Updated README task format documentation to avoid showing `project:: Inbox`.

## Release assets

This release includes the required Obsidian plugin assets:

- `manifest.json`
- `main.js`
- `styles.css`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Improved the mobile layout so belki is more usable in Obsidian Mobile.
- Added iOS safe-area spacing for the mobile top navigation.
- Preserved the horizontal mobile navigation scroll position after changing views.
- Made task details behave like a full-screen mobile panel instead of a cramped popup.
- Made selected date chips in the Add Task composer visually clear.
- Added better padding and line-height for the Add Task description field.
- Improved mobile label entry in task details so the input scrolls into view when the keyboard opens.
- Kept the Add Task more menu inside the viewport on small screens.

## Release assets

This release includes the required Obsidian plugin assets:

- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css
